reviews.comment:
Buenas tardes la semana pasada quise ingresar al sanitario de mujer .Pero las señoritas que atienden allí no me lo permitieron ..Siempre he entrado al sitio porque es una NECESIDAD,ME SENTI DISCRIMINADA ADEMAS LA EXPLICACIÓN DE ELLA QUE EN EL BAÑO SE GASTA EL PAPEL;JABÓN ETC ETC ....
NO PUEDE SER QUE A UNA PERSONA QUE NECESITA ENTRAR AL SANITARIO TE LO PROHIBAN ....
MALA ATENCION

(Translated by Google)
Good afternoon. Last week I wanted to use the women's restroom, but the attendants wouldn't let me. I've always used it because it's a necessity. I felt discriminated against, especially since their explanation was that toilet paper, soap, etc., are wasted in the restroom. It's unacceptable that someone who needs to use the restroom is denied access. Poor service.

reviewReply.comment:
Le informamos que los sanitarios son de uso exclusivo para clientes!!

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I went on a two-month expedition through Argentina, using only YPF gas stations for fuel. When I arrived at this particular station and asked to use the restroom, the employees refused, claiming it was only for customers, even after I explained my situation.

(Original)
Fiz uma expedição pela Argentina durante 2 meses utilizando somente os postos YPF para abastecer. Ao chegar neste posto e pedir para usar o banheiro, os funcionários não deixaram utilizar alegando que era somente pra clientes, mesmo explicando a minha situação.
